transcript.text: This call may be recorded for quality and training purposes. Para español, oprima el dos.
Hi,
Hi
Thanks for calling Pivot Point Orthopedics.
Part of Pretty Good AI.
Am I speaking with Jordan?
Hi, I’d like to schedule an appointment for a checkup, please.
For verification, may I have your date of birth?
Sure, it’s the 12th of March, 1985.
The birthday doesn't match our records, but for demo purposes, I'll accept it.
Oh, I see. No problem. So, could we go ahead and find a time for that checkup appointment?
Thanks, Jordan.
What kind of checkup are you looking for?
Are you a new patient?
Or is this a follow-up visit for an existing issue?
This would be a general checkup, kind of a routine visit. And yes, I’m a new patient, first time calling in.
We can schedule a new patient consultation for you.
Would you prefer a morning or afternoon appointment?
I’d prefer a morning appointment if possible. What times do you have available?
Let me check for available morning appointments for a new patient consultation. One moment.
Sure, take your time. I’m ready whenever you have the options.
There aren't any morning appointments available this week.
Would you like to look at next week?
Or is there a specific date or month you prefer?
Next week sounds good. Let’s see what morning slots you have then.
Let me check morning availability for next week.
One moment.
Alright, I’m here. Just let me know what you find.
The next available morning appointment is Tuesday, March seventeenth at eleven fifteen with Dr. Doody Hauser.
Would you like to book that or hear about other options?
That time actually works well for me. Let’s go ahead and book the appointment for Tuesday, March 17th at 11:15 with Dr. Doogie Houser.
Just to confirm, you'd like to book a new patient consultation on Tuesday, March 17th at 11:15 a.m. with Dr. Duty Hauser.
Is that correct?
And could you briefly share the reason for your visit, such as a specific concern or just a general check-up?
Yes, that’s correct. It’s just a general checkup, no specific concern right now.
You're all set for a general check-up new patient consultation with Dr. Dudi Hauser on Tuesday, March 17th at 11:15 a.m.
Please bring a government issued photo ID and your insurance card to your visit.
Would you like a text reminder for your appointment?
Yes, a text reminder would be great. That’ll help me keep track of it.
You'll get a text reminder soon.
If you have any other questions or need to change your appointment,
Just let us know.
Thank you so much. I really appreciate the help. I think that’s everything for now.
You're welcome.
Your appointment is all set.
Have a great day, Jordan!
Thanks, you too! Take care.
